message:
test(core): property-based tests for command guard security packs (wa-7mik)

27 proptest properties covering TrustLevel serde/display, GuardDecision
boolean exclusivity and serde, CommandGuard evaluate across trust levels,
safe pattern whitelist bypass, preflight/audit, evaluate_stateless,
per-pane overrides, disabled packs, and rule_id format validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
